name: ieso-worldview-agent
description: Explore NASA Worldview in natural language: discover satellite datasets, render reproducible map visualizations through the GeoUI Protocol, and iterate on them in a live browser.

ieso_mcp_key.title: IESO tools API token
ieso_mcp_key.description: FastMCP token (fmcp_...) for the shared IESO tools server group: GeoUI render/get-state, Worldview permalink, UMM-Vis lookup, Earthdata-search landing page, and PDF parser. Leave blank if those servers are public.

vector_db_token.title: IESO Validation API token
vector_db_token.description: FastMCP token (fmcp_...) for the layer-validation MCP (search_worldview_layers, validate_temporal_coverage). Leave blank if that server is public.

sde_mcp_key.title: Science Discovery Engine API token
sde_mcp_key.description: FastMCP token (fmcp_...) for the SDE fallback search MCP. Leave blank if the server is public.

eonet_token.title: EONET API token
eonet_token.description: FastMCP token (fmcp_...) for the EONET natural-event search MCP. Leave blank if the server is public.
